zh: 我从未见过如此美丽的日落。
en: Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset.

zh: 他很少迟到。
en: Seldom is he late.

zh: 她几乎不看电视。
en: Rarely does she watch TV.

zh: 他刚坐下，电话就响了。
en: Hardly had he sat down when the phone rang.

zh: 她一离开，他就到了。
en: No sooner had she left than he arrived.

zh: 直到他解释了，我才明白。
en: Not until he explained did I understand.

zh: 他不仅聪明，而且勤奋。
en: Not only is he clever, but he is also hardworking.

zh: 在任何情况下你都不能放弃。
en: Under no circumstances should you give up.

zh: 在任何情况下我都不会说谎。
en: In no case will I tell a lie.

zh: 他从未想到会赢得比赛。
en: Little did he think that he would win the game.

zh: 只有努力学习，你才能成功。
en: Only by studying hard can you succeed.

zh: 只有到那时，我才意识到错误。
en: Only then did I realize my mistake.

zh: 只有在她的帮助下，他才完成了任务。
en: Only with her help did he finish the task.

zh: 只有当你失去它，你才知道它的价值。
en: Only when you lose it do you know its value.

zh: 只有通过练习，你才能提高英语。
en: Only through practice can you improve your English.

zh: 他太累了，以至于无法继续工作。
en: So tired was he that he could not continue working.

zh: 她如此聪明，以至于所有人都喜欢她。
en: Such a clever girl is she that everyone likes her.

zh: 公共汽车来了。
en: Here comes the bus.

zh: 孩子们冲了出去。
en: Out rushed the children.

zh: 那些美好的日子已经一去不复返了。
en: Gone are the days when life was simple.

zh: 如果我是你，我就不会那样做。
en: Were I you, I would not do that.

zh: 如果他当时更小心，就不会发生事故了。
en: Had he been more careful, the accident would not have happened.

zh: 如果将来有机会，我会去拜访你。
en: Should there be a chance, I would visit you.

zh: 我也喜欢音乐。
en: So do I.

zh: 她也不喜欢蔬菜。
en: Neither does she like vegetables.

zh: 他也没有来。
en: Nor did he come.

zh: 在山顶上，可以看到整个城市。
en: From the top of the hill can you see the whole city.

zh: 在这个问题上，专家们意见不一。
en: On this issue do experts disagree.

zh: 他从未想到自己会成功。
en: Never did he imagine that he would succeed.

zh: 在任何情况下都不能忽视安全。
en: At no time should safety be ignored.
